The question asks which statement best represents the criticism of Andrew Carnegie found in the cartoon, but the cartoon itself is not provided in the text. However, based on the context of Susan B. Anthony’s speech about injustice and unequal power, the most likely criticism of Carnegie would focus on how his wealth was built through exploitation. Among the options, the one that directly ties unfair accumulation of wealth to worker exploitation is option C.  

\boxed{C}
